name: wheelwise
description: A product and engineering decision skill pack for turning ideas into a progressive Chinese Markdown product brief with visuals, demos, optional HTML display, and execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate progressive Chinese reports with visuals, demos, HTML display, and execution plans.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill product decision pack that structures raw ideas, selects the delivery surface, reviews feasibility and risk, evaluates existing solutions, creates visual briefs and interactive demo specs, and produces one complete progressive Chinese Markdown report file with an optional HTML display layer and a Codex-ready execution plan.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.
Use $using-wheelwise to create wheelwise-report.md and optional wheelwise-report.html for this idea.
